## Overview

The BrowserStack extension for Visual Studio Code is a powerful tool that allows developers to preview and test their locally hosted websites on BrowserStack’s real device cloud, directly from the VS Code environment. Supported by seamless setup & installation, the extension enables developers to accelerate testing local websites and improve debugging, thereby streamlining their cross browser testing workflow.

**This extension requires a paid account with BrowserStack.**

![Browser & Device Coverage](https://d2ogrdw2mh0rsl.cloudfront.net/production/external_referrer/vscode_extension_live/quick-launch.gif)

## Installation

To install the VSCode extension, follow these steps:

1. Open VS Code.
1. Press `Ctrl+Shift+X` or `Cmd+Shift+X` to open the Extensions panel.
1. Type BrowerStack into the search bar.
1. Click on the **BrowserStack** extension.
1. Click the Install button.

Alternatively, you can download the extension from the **Visual Studio Code Marketplace.**

## Key Features

### Easy Setup

Installing VSCode with the BrowserStack VSCode Extension is simple and straightforward. Download the extension directly from the Visual Code Marketplace and sign in/ sign up using your BrowserStack account to quickly integrate the extension into your development environment, ensuring a seamless installation experience.

![Easy Setup](https://d2ogrdw2mh0rsl.cloudfront.net/production/external_referrer/vscode_extension_live/sign-in.gif)

### Browser & Device Coverage

Test your locally hosted website across an extensive range of 3500+ real browsers & device combinations and add your favorite browser device combination on VSCode environment to quickly launch the session.

![Browser & Device Coverage](https://d2ogrdw2mh0rsl.cloudfront.net/production/external_referrer/vscode_extension_live/quick-launch.gif)

### Live Reload

View all the changes made in the VSCode interface directly on the remote device on your BrowserStack Live session and seamlessly modify code on the fly with instant hot-reload functionality.

Note: The host server needs to support live reload extension.

![Live Reload](https://d2ogrdw2mh0rsl.cloudfront.net/production/external_referrer/vscode_extension_live/reload.gif)

## Usage

To use the BrowserStack VSCode extension, follow these steps:

1. Sign-in either from the welcome page or through the extension on the activity bar.
1. Accept the request to be redirected to BrowserStack via the pop up.
1. Once you are logged in on VSCode, enter the URL of your public or private website and select your preferred device and start testing.

- For local websites, hosting on a server is required eg, [Live Server](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=ritwickdey.LiveServer)
